nodes.label: Force-close any open position at the latest price (manual control).

nodes.label: Wraps a PredictorProtocol: column mapping, single-entry cache, timeout.
nodes.norm_label: wraps a predictorprotocol: column mapping, single-entry cache, timeout.

nodes.norm_label: return forecast dataframe, or none if inference fails/times out.

nodes.norm_label: execute predictor.predict() in a thread; return none on timeout or error.

nodes.norm_label: two forecast() calls with the same last candle ts hit cache; predictor called on

nodes.norm_label: a new last candle timestamp causes a fresh predictor call.

nodes.norm_label: inference that exceeds timeout_s returns none without raising.

nodes.label: An exception inside predict() returns None without raising.
nodes.norm_label: an exception inside predict() returns none without raising.

nodes.norm_label: forecast +3% above current close with threshold_pct=0.02 → score == 1.0 (clamped

nodes.norm_label: fewer candles than min_history returns score 0.0 without calling adapter.
